zh.Kinsale, County Cork, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克金薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Courcy於大約1399年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親William de Courcy45歲，母親Margaret Paynel35歲。她於大約1424年與Sir John Pelham Knt.結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國素可勞頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國素可瓦布萊頓。

zh-hans.Kinsale, County Cork, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 科克金薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Courcy于大约1399年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲William de Courcy45岁，母亲Margaret Paynel35岁。她于大约1424年与Sir John Pelham Knt.结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国素可勞頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国素可瓦布萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Courcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Andree, Jacques, Michel, Monique.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Calvados, Loiret, Manche, and Marne called Courcy.
History: Nicolas Lemière dit Courcy from Courcy in Manche, France, married Louise-Geneviève Dubé in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1749.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Courcy was born about 1399, in Normandy, France, her father, William de Courcy, was 45 and her mother, Margaret Paynel, was 35. She married Sir John Pelham Knt. about 1424. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1460, in Laughton, Sussex, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Warbleton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Courcy est née environ 1399, à Normandie, France, son père, William de Courcy, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Paynel, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Pelham Knt. environ 1424. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Warbleton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Courcy um 1399 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Courcy 45 und ihre Mutter Margaret Paynel 35. Sie hat um 1424 Sir John Pelham Knt. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Laughton, Sussex, England und wurde in Warbleton, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Courcy è nata il circa 1399 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William de Courcy, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Margaret Paynel, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Pelham Knt. circa 1424. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Laughton, Sussex, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Warbleton, Sussex, England.

ja.Normandie, France: フランスノーマンディ
ja.Laughton, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスラウトン
ja.Warbleton, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスワーブレトン
ja.Kinsale, County Cork, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ コルクキンサル
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Courcyが約1399年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父William de Courcyは45歳，母Margaret Paynelは35歳であった。約1424年にSir John Pelham Knt.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリススセックスラウトンで62歳で死去し，イギリススセックスワーブレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Courcy(이)가 대략 1399년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Courcy(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Paynel(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 Sir John Pelham Knt.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 워블레턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Courcy nasceu aproximadamente 1399, em Normandie, França, seu pai, William de Courcy, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Paynel, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Pelham Knt. aproximadamente 1424. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Courcy родилась около 1399 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William de Courcy было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Paynel, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Pelham Knt. около 1424 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности варблетон, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Courcy nació aproximadamente 1399, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, William de Courcy, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret Paynel, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir John Pelham Knt. aproximadamente 1424. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
